title: Caramelized Hake with Flaky Crust
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish featuring hake fillets topped with a caramelized crust, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Season the hake fillets with salt and black pepper.
Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Place the hake fillets on one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch (1 cm) border.
Brush the edges of the pastry with skillet oil.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the hake fillets, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the top of the pastry with skillet oil and sprinkle with caramelized onions.
Place the skillet on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown and the hake is cooked through.
